response.global_summary: A promotional video featuring VTubers Fuwawa and Mococo presenting their birthday merchandise set, including a dance segment and a guest appearance by the Japanese comedian Kuro-chan. No vocal singing occurs throughout the video.

Fuwawa and Mococo perform a promotional dance. No singing.
